assessmentQuestionVersion.name: Patisiran_Initial_Initiation_Criteria_Q3_R1_N
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText: Polyneuropathy Disability (PND) stage I ≤ IIIB; OR
assessmentQuestionVersion.responseValues: Polyneuropathy Disability (PND) stage I ≤ IIIB; Familial Amyloidotic Polyneuropathy (FAP) stage I or II
